name: Rogue Outcast 1M Beam

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E392702B-DA3F-4117-A7F6-57F77086C01B

comment:
•	Fully featured, high powered IP65 rated beam fixture with a Red, Mint and Blue LED, single gobo 
         wheel with static gobos, layerable prisms in a lightweight and durable aluminum / magnesium casing
•	Fast and precise movement of pan and tilt functions
•	Individually controllable and layerable 5- and 8-facet prisms
•	Frost for even light distribution
•	5-pin DMX input/output connections 
•	Tight 1.6° beam for extremely focused areal effects 
•	RDM enabled for remote addressing and troubleshooting
•	17 static gobos on one wheel for dynamic gobo effects
•	Easy to read OLED display with simple, effective menu options
•	Simple and complex DMX channel profiles for programming versatility
•	USB-C port for uploading software
